hair.description: Black hair — same role as player family

subcell_fill.description: Yellow sub-cell rendering fill — rendering technique color, not a body part

skin.description: Flesh tone — same role as player family; appears as bg on face cells and as fg on shirt/arm transition cells

skin_detail.description: Dark red mouth detail — same role as player family

shirt_primary.description: Purple torso — same role as player family

pants_dark.description: Dark blue pants — same role as player family

pants_bright.description: Bright blue pants highlight — same role as player family

boots_primary.description: Brown boots — same role as player family

weapon_light.description: Light gray weapon blade/metal — attack-family specific

weapon_dark.description: Dark gray weapon handle/shadow — attack-family specific

regions.name: weapon
regions.notes: Sword/weapon held in right hand. Uses gray palette not found in player family. Blade extends above head, handle connects to arm area.

regions.name: face
regions.notes: Face shifted right vs player idle (centered at x=4 instead of x=3) due to wider frame and weapon. Same glyph/color conventions: " for eyes, v for mouth.

regions.name: shirt
regions.notes: Same purple (#aa00aa) shirt as player family but body is narrower (3 cells wide vs 5) since arms are in attack pose.

regions.name: pants
regions.notes: Pants center cell (4,6) is a solid dark-blue space — rare full-cell fill. Same blue palette as player.

regions.name: boots
regions.notes: Boot row. Left boot at (3,8) uses black fg on yellow bg (inverted from player idle pattern). Right boot at (5,8) matches standard player boot pattern.

ambiguities: Weapon region overlaps with head/face area at x=5 — the guard cell (5,2) is adjacent to face cells; recoloring weapon should not touch face skin
Only frame 0 annotated; attack animation frames 1-7 show progressive sword swing with shifting weapon bbox
Left boot at (3,8) has inverted color pattern vs right boot — may be pose-specific shadow or consistent asymmetry (needs cross-frame verification)
The #ffff55 yellow is a sub-cell rendering fill color, NOT hair — same as player family. Hair is black (#000000)
Other angle rows not annotated — weapon position and body orientation will shift significantly across angles
Attack-0001 is the base attack variant; other attack-XXXX files encode weapon states via the 4-bit AHSW system and may have different weapon region geometry
